notable_flags.detail: NACE is 'Poradenske cinnosti v podnikani' (70220) but contracts are construction/renovation work. All 4 non-EU-buyer contracts flagged.
3 contracts flagged — company founded Nov 2022, revenue grew from 6.2K to 963K EUR in 2 years, winning 467K+ EUR single contracts.
Buyer-side signatories (Prof. Dano, Paeddr. Cech, Mgr. Fiabane) sign for many suppliers — indicates institutional pattern, not necessarily suspicious.

key_findings: YEMANITY s.r.o. is a young company (est. Nov 2022) with rapid revenue growth from 6.2K EUR (2022) to 963K EUR (2024).
Registered NACE code is management consulting (7020) but all CRZ contracts are construction/renovation work — classic NACE mismatch pattern.
Company has 2 contracts with Ekonomicka univerzita v Bratislave totaling 625,252.16 EUR.
Three persons connected at Level 1: Filip Sobol (50% owner, konatel since 2024), Jan Sutiak (50% owner, konatel since founding), and Tomas Polka (historical shareholder, Zilina address).
Jan Sutiak's address matches the company registered address (Vychylovka 1045, Nova Bystrica).
No debts or tax delinquencies reported.
Total debt ratio is 72.71% — relatively high leverage for a consulting firm doing construction.
Shallow analysis did not reveal additional companies connected via the persons — deeper foaf.sk person-page investigation would be needed to map the full network.
recommended_next_steps: Deep-click into Filip Sobol, Jan Sutiak, and Tomas Polka person pages on foaf.sk to discover their other company affiliations.
Check UVO procurement portal for YEMANITY bids and competitor analysis.
Verify RPVS beneficial ownership registration if company is a public sector partner.
Investigate Tomas Polka's exit as shareholder and whether it coincided with Filip Sobol's entry (March 2024).
